filter.description:
Optional filter string for selective merge-back during checkout operations.
Grammar: comma-separated tokens with optional `+`/`-`/`--` prefix.

key.description: Simple-language expression for the claim-check key (e.g. "${header.claimKey}").

ExceptionDisposition.description:
Disposition for an exception handler or catch clause (ADR-0019).

# YAML casing

serde uses `lowercase` casing: `handled`, `propagate`, `continued`.

# Default divergence

`ExceptionDisposition::default()` returns `Propagate` (first variant per `#[derive(Default)]`),
but the YAML + builder layers default to `Handled` for doTry catch clauses
(via `default_handled_disposition()` in `camel-dsl/src/route_ast.rs` and the `DoCatchBuilder::do_catch_exception` constructor).
Direct struct construction should explicitly set disposition rather than relying on `Default`.

oneOf.description: After retry exhaustion / on_steps / DLC, re-throw to upstream.
Suppress re-throw. The handler's exchange is the final result.
Clear the error. The pipeline continues to the NEXT step.

eager.description: Reserve the key before running the child (default `false`).

expression.description: Simple-language expression that extracts the message-id (e.g. `"${header.messageId}"`).

remove_on_failure.description: When `eager`, remove the key if the child fails (default `false`).

steps.description: Child sub-pipeline executed on first-time (non-duplicate) exchanges.

message.description: The log message. Can be a plain string literal or a nested expression object.

LogMessageData.description:
The `message` field inside a `log: { message: ... }` config block.
Either a bare string literal or a value-source expression (simple, rhai, language+source).

count.description: Fixed iteration count. Mutually exclusive with `while`.

LoopWhileExpr.description: Expression-only predicate for loop while condition.

trust_upstream_principal.description:
When `true`, the policy accepts an already-populated
`camel.auth.principal` exchange property when no Bearer token is
present. Default `false` (fail-closed) — the principal must come
from token validation. See H1 in
`docs/superpowers/specs/v1-sec-stabilization-spec.md`.

ScatterGatherData.description:
Scatter-Gather EIP — stateless parallel fan-out + gather.
Lowers to Multicast with aggregation. No correlation key
(spec §5 "correlation key" wording corrected: stateless form
has none; stateful aggregation is the separate Aggregator EIP).

expression.description: Expression that extracts a sort key from each body element (e.g. simple: "${body.field}").

TransformStep.description: `transform:` step — alias for `set_body:`, reuses all SetBodyData types.

schema.description:
Optional JSON Schema. When present, the compiled UnmarshalService is
wrapped with a `JsonSchemaValidateService` that returns
`CamelError::ValidationError` (→ 400 Bad Request) on a mismatch.
Only effective when the format parses to `Body::Json` (currently `json`
is the only format that produces JSON in v1).

description:
Schema envelope for the public DSL surface.

Excludes templates (which use `noyalib::compat::serde_yaml::Value` —
a type that does not implement JsonSchema). Templates are internal
machinery; the public SDK schema is `{routes: [...]}` only.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema URL (mirrors RouteDslRoutes.schema_url — added in Task 9).

title: RouteDslSchemaEnvelope
